message:
feat(core): Alt+Backspace parsing, caps probe hardening, inline mode fixes

Input Parser (input_parser.rs):
- Add Alt+Backspace (ESC + 0x7F DEL) handling - previously swallowed the byte
  and returned to ground state instead of emitting the expected key event
- Minor test improvements: panic! → unreachable! for impossible branches

Caps Probe (caps_probe.rs):
- Major refactoring for robustness and determinism
- Improved terminal capability detection with better error handling
- Reduced probe timing sensitivity for more reliable results across terminals

Inline Mode (inline_mode.rs):
- Simplified state machine for cleaner inline/fullscreen transitions
- Fixed edge cases in scrollback preservation during mode switches
- Better handling of terminal resize events in inline mode

Animation Callbacks (callbacks.rs):
- Minor cleanup and type safety improvements

These changes address several reported issues with terminal compatibility
and input handling edge cases discovered during the bd-2dui coverage audit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
